conditionalFiles.PARITY_CLAIMS.md: required for product-inspired, rebuild, compatibility, agentic, webapp, or user-facing scopes
conditionalFiles.THREAT_MODEL.md: required for auth, payments, admin, API, upload, sensitive data, destructive actions, multi-user or external side-effect scopes
conditionalFiles.DATA_LIFECYCLE.md: required when persistent, synced, imported, exported, or user-owned data exists
conditionalFiles.QUALITY_SCORECARD.md: required before product-proof or publish-ready claims
conditionalFiles.RUNTIME_LIVE_TEST_PLAN.md: required when product runtime/browser QA needs a separate harness plan

mustNotCountAsProductImplementation: in-memory-only stores when persistence is claimed
doneCriteria: Included capabilities are real or excluded.
Build passes or blocker is explicit.
Tests pass or blocker is explicit.
Runtime QA evidence exists for product/app/feature scope.
Persistence/restart proof exists when product state exists.
Final report includes commands, artifacts, completed included capabilities, excluded capabilities, and remaining gaps.
